name: Setup Claude Code
description: Configure Claude Code with Forge Kit defaults for MCP servers, hooks, skills, and global settings. Best for developers standardizing a local AI workflow on a machine with existing Claude Code access.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Setup Claude Code
pt-BR.description: Configura o Claude Code com defaults do Forge Kit para servidores MCP, hooks, skills e ajustes globais. Ideal para padronizar o workflow local de IA em uma máquina com Claude Code já disponível.
